name: Oversized Printed Floral Primalush Throw Blanket Gold - Threshold™
description:
Add a stunning look to your living space with this Oversized Printed Floral Primalush Throw Blanket from Threshold™. This oversized throw blanket is made from luxurious recycled polyester knitted material to create a soft and cozy feel that's perfect to snuggle up in. Drape the floral throw blanket over a sofa or living room chair for an added pop of color and soft, cozy comfort.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
